title: On A Henpecked Country Squire.
content:
As father Adam first was fool'd,
            A case that's still too common,
        Here lies a man a woman rul'd,
            The devil rul'd the woman.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Burns delivers a powerful performance in "On A Henpecked Country Squire."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
